description: Add 7 symbol-resolution tasks to ccb_crossrepo where the primary goal is locating definitions, callers, or implementors of symbols across repository boundaries. Uses F1 scoring on structured JSON output.

userStories.title: Create crossrepo-sym-001: Find all callers of Envoy xDS API across Istio and Envoy
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent must find all callers of a specific Envoy xDS gRPC service method across envoyproxy/envoy and istio/istio repos. Agent outputs callers.json with {repo, file, line, function, context}.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_crossrepo/crossrepo-sym-001/ has complete task files (task.toml, instruction.md, environment/Dockerfile, tests/test.sh, tests/ground_truth.json)
task.toml has category=symbol_resolution, language=go,cpp
Dockerfile clones both envoyproxy/envoy and istio/istio at pinned commit SHAs into /workspace/
instruction.md specifies a concrete xDS method (e.g., StreamAggregatedResources) and asks for all callers across both repos
ground_truth.json contains 8-15 caller entries with {repo, file, function} keys
tests/test.sh computes F1 score (precision+recall) matching agent's /workspace/callers.json against ground truth
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and crossrepo_2config.sh TASKS array
userStories.notes: Used envoyproxy/envoy + grpc/grpc-go (not istio — istio not indexed on Sourcegraph). Ground truth: 13 callers verified via Sourcegraph read_file. Both repos indexed on SG for MCP advantage.

userStories.title: Create crossrepo-sym-002: Find all callers of client-go SharedInformer across Kubernetes repos
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent finds all usages of a specific client-go SharedInformer factory method across kubernetes/kubernetes and a controller repo (e.g., kubernetes/autoscaler or argoproj/argo-cd).
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_crossrepo/crossrepo-sym-002/ has complete task files
Dockerfile clones 2 repos at pinned SHAs
ground_truth.json has 8-15 caller entries
F1 scorer in test.sh
Task registered in selected_benchmark_tasks.json and crossrepo_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Used kubernetes/kubernetes + kubernetes/autoscaler. Method: Apps().V1().Deployments(). Ground truth: 11 verified callers (8 k8s, 3 autoscaler) via Sourcegraph keyword_search + read_file. Both repos indexed on Sourcegraph.

userStories.title: Create crossrepo-sym-003: Find all callers of Terraform provider interface across repos
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent finds all implementations and callers of Terraform's provider.Provider interface across hashicorp/terraform and a provider repo (e.g., hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws).
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_crossrepo/crossrepo-sym-003/ has complete task files
Dockerfile clones hashicorp/terraform + one provider repo
ground_truth.json has 8+ entries
F1 scorer, task registered
userStories.notes: Used hashicorp/terraform + hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws. Ground truth: 10 entries (8 from terraform core, 2 from provider). F1 scorer with same pattern as sym-001/002. Registered in selected_benchmark_tasks.json and crossrepo_2config.sh.

userStories.title: Create crossrepo-impl-001 and crossrepo-impl-002: Interface implementor tasks
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want two tasks where the agent finds all implementations of a Go interface across repos. (1) io.Reader-like interface in a large project, (2) a gRPC service server interface across 2-3 repos.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_crossrepo/crossrepo-impl-001/ and crossrepo-impl-002/ have complete task files
Each outputs implementors.json with {repo, file, line, struct_name, methods_implemented}
Each ground_truth.json has 5-10 implementors
test.sh computes F1 on struct_name matching
Both tasks registered
userStories.notes: crossrepo-impl-001: runtime.Object interface across kubernetes/api and kubernetes/apimachinery (10 implementors: Pod, Deployment, Service, etc.). crossrepo-impl-002: AggregatedDiscoveryServiceServer gRPC interface across envoyproxy/go-control-plane, istio/istio, emissary-ingress/emissary (4 implementors). F1 scorer, Dockerfiles with multi-repo clones, registered in configs.

userStories.title: Create crossrepo-chain-001 and crossrepo-chain-002: Dependency chain resolution tasks
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want two tasks where the agent traces a symbol's definition through a chain of package dependencies (A imports B imports C — where is the original definition?). Output: chain.json with {usage_site, re_exports, original_definition} with file:line for each link.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_crossrepo/crossrepo-chain-001/ and crossrepo-chain-002/ have complete task files
Each Dockerfile clones 3 repos forming a dependency chain
Each instruction.md provides a usage site and asks agent to trace to original definition
ground_truth.json includes the complete chain with intermediate re-export points
test.sh scores each link in the chain independently (partial credit per correct hop)
Both tasks registered in selected_benchmark_tasks.json and crossrepo_2config.sh
userStories.notes: crossrepo-chain-001: Kubernetes TypeMeta chain (k/k → k/api → k/apimachinery). crossrepo-chain-002: Envoy RouteConfiguration chain (istio → go-control-plane → data-plane-api). Both use partial credit scorer for each step in the chain. Ground truth verified via Sourcegraph.
